title: マイルCSの後に・伝説バク誕！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sakura Bakushin O runs the full very, very long distance of 1,600 meters at the Mile Championship and obtains a brilliant mark of victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's heart swells as she
contemplates her talents and potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her journey still continues! Until the day
she conquers the Bakushin Road, she must
Bakushin on!
